name: The Trud
short_description: The Trud is a horror game that combines exploration with stealth gameplay, here you'll need to find your way out and discover what's happening in the school while monsters are trying to catch you.
detailed_description:
The Trud has a fresh new look and Gameplay

The Trud received a full rework and is now much more fun to play. Based on players suggestions and opinions, some additions and changes were made that changed the way you play the game. Giving you a much better experience compared to the first release. See the post in the community Hub if you want to know what happened and what's changed.


About the Game

The Trud is a first person game that seeks an atmospheric and immersive horror, the game combines exploration with stealth, you'll need to find out what's happening and find a way out of your torment while being hunted by monsters.


After passing out while running from a robber on an alley, you wake up in a very strange place, but at the same time it looks familiar. It's almost like it wasn't real. During the game you'll need find and piece together the story to find what's happening in that place, and at the same time find a way out while The Trud tries to stop you, appealing to your worst nightmares.

supported_languages:
English*, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support
